text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's morning. Heading towards the<n>office, I
happen to see Manhattan<n>Cafe in the middle of
training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I gasp at what looks like waterfalls of<n>sweat.
Just how long as she been<n>here running?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Now that I think of it, last night too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... can keep running...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I have to run... even faster... so I can...<n>catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she's right back to<n>training this
early despite how late<n>she was at it last night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Not really. I do this... all the time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's quiet at night... And I can... see the<n>other side
more clearly...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If I focus... I can see my Friend...<n>running in front.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.
choice_data_list: I could've sworn it was only you I saw last night.
I could've sworn it was only you I saw last night.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! Cafe, can I have a<n>moment?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Oh, is she the friend you were talking about?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, we haven't... met before.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Nice to meet you! To tell you<n>the truth, I...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I think you're amazing the way you<n>train
diligently all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Amazing? All I'm doing is... running.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, but I still think that's amazing.<n>So, um... if
it's fine by you, could we<n>train together?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You want to train... with me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Sure. I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! I'll do my best to keep<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd be able to keep up... but<n>before I
knew it, I was left so far<n>behind...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I knew... when to up my pace... from<n>your
breathing. I must've thrown you<n>off your
rhythm... just a little.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah, haha... You read me like a book.<n>You're right,
I probably messed up<n>my pacing out of panic.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're truly amazing. Once you took<n>the lead, it
seemed like you'd never<n>let me have it back.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You seemed zeroed in on the path<n>ahead.
Weren't you concerned about<n>how close I
might've been?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... I passed you... my Friend was<n>still ahead...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see... I gotta admit, that's a little<n>frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, never mind! Thank you for training<n>with me
today! Let's run again some<n>other time! See you!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What a... strange girl...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What is there to be gained... from<n>running... with
me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm just... trying to catch up... to my<n>Friend.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe gazes yearningly<n>towards the
clearly vacant track, then<n>breaks into a run.
